headline: A Look At Rollins (ROL) Valuation After FTC Noncompete Order And Recent Share Price Pullback
summary: The Federal Trade Commission’s recent order against Rollins (ROL) to stop enforcing noncompete agreements for more than 18,000 workers puts the company’s labor practices under closer scrutiny for current and potential shareholders. See our latest analysis for Rollins. The share price, now at US$55.97, has seen a 6.69% 1 month share price return but an 11.84% 3 month share price decline, while the 5 year total shareholder return of 58.00% points to stronger longer term compounding. If this...

headline: Waste Connections Stock Gains 3.2% Since Q1 Earnings Beat
summary: WCN beats Q1 earnings estimates as revenues rise 6.4% y/y. Gains in core waste segments offset recycling weakness and lift shares post-results.
